title: Extracting Key Metrics from Financial Reports
scenario: A financial analyst wants to extract key metrics from financial reports. The reports include tables with income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements. The user wants to extract a JSON object with the extracted metrics and their descriptions.
constraints: Must handle multiple tables with different financial data

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output extracts the correct metrics and their descriptions
Check if the output preserves the original formatting
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (400 characters)
